title: Bundle Format v1 Conformance Fixture Result
description: The shape a conformant verifier MUST produce when run against a fixture's bundle.zip with the declared verification_options. Equivalent to the native CLI's --json output (output.JSONOutput; output_format_version='1'). Per-fixture results.json files conform to this schema.

output_format_version.description: Stable version of the output schema. CI parsers MUST verify this is '1' and fail loudly on any other value rather than silently accept v2+ output.

verdict.description: Overall verdict per spec §14 aggregate semantics. 'partial_verification' surfaces incomplete state (warns without opt-in flag OR skips without --offline).

exit_code.description: Process exit code. 0 = pass; 1 = fail or partial_verification. 2 (invocation error) is out of scope for results.json — it would mean the verifier rejected the inputs before running checks.

reason.description: Operator-readable rationale. Implementation-specific natural-language text; conformance comparison IGNORES this field's value (only the structural fields above + per-check status + summary counts are compared).

checks.description: Per-check verdict array in spec §14 order. Length depends on manifest.signing.topology (spec §5 v1.0.9 amendment): exactly 7 entries (check_id 1..7) under single-key topology (legacy + customer-export + example-demo); exactly 8 entries (check_id 1..7 + check_id 8 ephemeral-session) under ephemeral-sessions topology (sandbox-preview at v1.0.9). v1.0.7 conformance fixtures use length 7; v1.0.9 sandbox-preview ephemeral fixtures use length 8.

check_id.description: Spec §14 check number. Stable across releases — CI integrations match on this. v1.0.9 amendment raised the maximum to 8 (Check 8 ephemeral-session; conditional under ephemeral-sessions topology).

check_name.description: Short human-readable label ('manifest signature', 'artifact integrity', etc.). Optional; MAY be omitted by a conformant verifier. MAY evolve across releases; do not match on this. (Dropped from required at Phase 5.5 Session 5.5.1B fix-up batch per spec-conformance-reviewer finding #14 — check_name was inconsistently treated as both 'implementation-localized' and 'required', resolved by making it optional.)

check_slug.description: Stable lowercase slug. CI integrations match on this OR on check_id. These slugs match the canonical Slug() returns in apps/cli/internal/checks/check*_*.go and are the conformance-stable identifiers across all implementations. v1.0.9 amendment added 'ephemeral-session' (check_id 8; sandbox-preview ephemeral-sessions topology only).

status.description: Per-check outcome. Conformance comparison matches on this field exactly.

warn_category.description: Spec §14.4 (v1.0.7) structured warn-fold category. Populated by v1.0.7+ verifiers when Status='warn' and the warn matches an opt-in category; empty string otherwise. Optional (additive in v1.0.7; pre-v1.0.7 verifier output may omit). Conformance comparison ignores this field's value — it's a forward-progress field that v1.0.7+ implementations emit but the contract validates via summary.warns_opted_into_pass.

errors.description: Specific errors when status='fail'. Always emitted as an array (empty when no errors). Conformance comparison IGNORES this field's contents — verifiers may emit different natural-language strings.

warnings.description: Operationally meaningful warnings (pending OTS, placeholder prod key, etc.). Always emitted as an array (empty when no warnings). Conformance comparison IGNORES this field's contents.

skip_reason.description: Human-readable explanation when status='skipped'. Always emitted as a string (empty when not skipped). Conformance comparison IGNORES this field's contents.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration in milliseconds. Conformance comparison IGNORES this field — varies per run.

warns_opted_into_pass.description: Count of warns folded into passed via --allow-pending-ots / --allow-anchor-pending / --allow-dev-key. Subset of 'passed'.

summary.description: Per-bucket counts. **Summary arithmetic** (per apps/cli/internal/checks/aggregate.go): `passed` MUST equal `(count of checks[] entries with status='pass') + warns_opted_into_pass`; `warned` MUST equal `(count of checks[] entries with status='warn') - warns_opted_into_pass`. The sum `passed + failed + warned + skipped` MUST equal `len(checks)` — 7 for single-key topology bundles, 8 for ephemeral-sessions topology bundles (spec §5 v1.0.9 amendment). `warns_opted_into_pass` is the count of WARN-status checks folded INTO `passed` via --allow-pending-ots / --allow-anchor-pending / --allow-dev-key opt-in flags (subset of `passed`). Conformance comparison matches on all five fields exactly. (Arithmetic clarified at Phase 5.5 Session 5.5.1B fix-up batch per spec-conformance-reviewer finding #11; per-bucket maxima raised to 8 at v1.0.9 amendment.)
